concept: My Babygate Is My Only Cardio
title: Funny Baby Parent Shirt - 'My Babygate Is My Only Cardio' Relatable Parenting Humor Tee
description:
Parenting: the ultimate endurance test—featuring babygates as your primary obstacle course. If corralling your tiny escape artist is your sole form of exercise, welcome to the club. This hilarious and oh-so-relatable design captures the absurd and exhausting reality of running after a toddler who thinks they're an Olympic sprinter. Bonus points if the babygate is smarter than you. 

Perfect for:
- Sleep-deprived moms and dads embracing the chaos
- Baby shower gifts for first-time parents
- Grandparents who've survived this cardio before
- Anyone who finds humor in the madness of daily parenting

DETAILS:
- Bold, clean typography with a playful touch
- Available in a full range of light and dark colors
- Features the slogan: 'My Babygate Is My Only Cardio' with energetic, whimsical lettering
- Each shirt is made-to-order with care and sarcasm

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
